title: rubus idaeus subsp. maritimus
intro: Rubus idaeus subsp. maritimus, also known as sea raspberry or coastal raspberry, is a subspecies of Rubus idaeus, a species of raspberry native to coastal areas in Europe and Asia. This plant is prized for its medicinal properties, which include its high content of anthocyanins, flavonoids, and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Rubus idaeus subsp. maritimus include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. Rubus idaeus subsp. maritimus is typically used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to support overall health and well-being.
